approvedMaster.verificationMethod: sha256sum on repository binary at import time, cross-checked against manifest claim (match)

sourcePackage.zipIntegrity: PASS (Python zipfile.testzip() returned None; 31 entries, no CRC errors)
sourcePackage.pathTraversalCheck: PASS (all 31 entries are relative paths under the package root directory; no absolute paths, no ../)

sourceV3Provenance.note: The ZIP does not include the original v3 ZIP itself; it includes the extracted frames-v3-original/ directory (10 PNGs), which serves as the byte-identity proof required by the task ('exact per-frame hashes ที่พิสูจน์ byte identity ได้'). Manifest additionally cites an external source v3 ZIP SHA-256 (8852ffaa9c631d3fd107c6ea98c93cf1f499d87b47dee4cadbb36abea33d9825) that was not independently verifiable in this environment (that ZIP was not uploaded); reliance is placed on the included frames-v3-original/ binaries instead, which were hashed directly.

oldToNewMapping.pose: Full Draw (arrow still nocked, string at cheek, bow flexed)
Release (arrow detached and in flight, string relaxed) — see releaseFrameDetermination

immutabilityVerification.originalFramesUnchanged: All 10 mapped original frames confirmed byte-identical (SHA-256 match) between frames-v3-original/ and their corresponding frames-v3-1-12frame/ position. Zero re-encoding, resize, or metadata rewrite detected.
immutabilityVerification.newFramesUniqueness: Frame 004 (44742b13...) and frame 006 (13b6ba08...) do not match any of the other 12 frame hashes, each other, or any of the 10 original frame hashes — confirmed genuinely new, non-duplicate content.
immutabilityVerification.frame011ExactMaster: Frame 011 SHA-256 (4911e7e3ba59241ee011be3e62f1b64230dcf9b3c24c6aeb23dc939d83311013) is byte-identical to the Approved Neutral Master.

footBaseline.measuredConsistency: uniform across all 12 frames, including frame 011 which is byte-identical to the Approved Master
footBaseline.note: Measured value (854) matches the previously-established repository baseline convention recorded in the Idle package approval (footBaselineY: 854) and Move package approval (supportFootBaselineY: 854). The manifest's stated 855 is treated as a documentation discrepancy, not a binary defect; measured binary truth (854) is authoritative per this task's own instruction to measure from binaries, not trust JSON/MD claims.

timing.anchorProvenance: carried forward from Attack v3 handoff spec contract; package did not supply a differing value
timing.durationSource: measured directly from GIF frame delay metadata via PIL ImageSequence, cross-checked against manifest table (exact match)

releaseFrameDetermination.resolutionMethod: Direct visual inspection of the source binaries plus independent timing cross-check, per task instruction to record the actual visual frame rather than blindly copy a stated marker.
evidence: Pixel inspection of frames-v3-original/archer-attack-v3-frame-005.png: arrow still nocked on the string, string pulled to cheek, bow fully flexed — this is Full Draw, not Release.

Pixel inspection of frames-v3-original/archer-attack-v3-frame-006.png: arrow detached from the bow and shown mid-flight to the right of the character, string relaxed/snapped forward, drawing hand in follow-through position — this is Release.
Manifest's own mapping table independently labels v3.1 frame 007 as 'Full draw' and frame 008 as 'Release', consistent with the pixel evidence.
Task's own stated requirement 'Release duration: 7 centiseconds เท่าเดิม' matches the measured v3.1 duration of frame index 8 (7cs); frame index 7 measures 9cs, which does not match.
releaseFrameDetermination.conclusion: Frame 008 (byte-identical to original v3 frame 006) is the actual visual Release frame. The task prompt's Section 5 reference to 'new 007' as the Release frame appears to be an off-by-one description error (007 is Full Draw, the pose immediately preceding Release). This record uses frame 008 as the release frame for review-candidate purposes; no runtime marker was modified, per task instruction (Section 5: 'ยังไม่ต้องแก้ Runtime marker').

validation.lastRunResult: PASS (exit 0) — 12 RGBA 640x960 frames verified, old->new mapping verified byte-for-byte, frame 011 == Approved Master, foot baseline uniform, review artifacts present, approval-state invariants hold, timing totals preserved, release-frame duration (index 8) == 7cs

approvalState.note: This status reflects a technical/integration verdict only. It is not, and must not be interpreted as, user/human visual approval. attackV3_1PackageApproved remains false until an explicit user verdict is recorded.
